return(function(...)local F={"[tNN^\\q<=KX9m\\FYV\\$","[Rh5a\"mJ&","&tRaPRHYrv6FhODNO","[!%,<7QE1";"&TUS2TUG4","&tDX=","[H3BUGqH","&15Se1HmYt3E=";"&p3yctIX=","&TUssEw==","&EIN7qRzC";"[s+";"&A4yiRCpfpVfzAGf7","[R1o+DoX","[H3BQ;","&E5Fst5h=";"[H3B0%ocY&","[RbnXfoAUm]m>RE:";"[QHX.Q$lduMRmmpk9!L";"&pIFrTw==";"&E3G2p5Su","[";"[fNb:";"[[7,+MoAoFYoAUnFR1.&7";"[siT>%SLj1";"[X2*_2$\\,.]8J1js","&E5mjLgAI1edyp9==";"&Ta1b","&pUrs15FP";"&vaF6TaapAUmyvVyTFOTI","[m3s@\"";"[[ocl$,61^t9i^?L","&FvFQvIGB1Bkpaam8LaA=";"&TBp7AI16TfB4Ka1XOgE=";"&tUN7OH1QAe1ba4yQ1w==","[o_dhUX`8\"8>06W(,h","&tRG4qd==","&grSupgNs15GMt5O=","[fsHY99!iNCoPGB.fSJ";"[8d1D!f6\"hF1un7F8?E";"&tDV=","[Rql]`qSc@K";"&pgm7tIX=";"[!M48"}local n=string.sub for F=690861971%4457174,#S,-211805-(-211806)do local g=S[F]if v(g)=="string"then local v=n(g,372208771%((685328236-585185089%2952741)%7840100),414430+-414429)if v=="&"then return(function(M,S,J,v,I,c,F,m,D,N,R,h,o,z,C,q,V,n,g,j,e)R,j,m,e,D,z,V,n,C,o,q,h,N,g={},function(j,S,v,I)local E,W,r,a,H,O,Z,o,w,y,s,b,x,G,f,A,T,h,X,U,u,Y,n,l,i,L,d,V,e,B,K,Q,c,k,P while j do if j<4261267916%17223286 then if(-420232+2630212747)%16011923-(1482652-669428)>j then if 3271220904%(6678603204%27317934)>j then if j<-662329+1556137 then if j>-130529+767831 then if j<2431760892%14134092 then G,i=848138+-848137,3133408123%13390633 K=#o L=d(G,K)G=k(o,L)L=nil K=R[X]f=G-i w=E(f)K[G]=w f,G=243952-((1555141-2321829781%11781608)+-458184),nil w=#o K=w==f j=K and 9377353-38349 or 344208-(-304625)elseif 624045835%3350791>j then w=C(w)d=nil e=C(e)o=C(o)e,r,G=nil,nil,nil V=C(V)E=C(E)L,K=nil,nil h=C(h)h,G=nil,t(134833643%1706244)X=C(X)X,Y=t(-348-(-40712)),nil k=C(k)Y=t(-695915-(-775131+(-40484-(-79354))))V=F[Y]Y=t((67071+(689073+-707763))-8019)o=V[Y]L=t(1549207421%6885187)Y=g()V=g()R[V]=o j,o=2348954045%(24573591-258843559%8901532),(34078577600%2272391002)%11269172 R[Y]=o o={}d=F[X]X=t(-846200+886563)E=d[X]d={}X=g()R[X]=d r=g()d=1364947970%7109104 R[r]=d k=F[L]L=t(1087925539%5059931)d=k[L]L=F[G]G=t(1616914301%13039306)k=L[G]G,L=2315702762%9116939,(15951-98777)+82827 K=G G=968328+-968327 w=G G=123597-123597 f=w<G G=L-w else else if 3236613131%(-785862+16569378)>j then if 2628046383%14048715>j then k,K=k+L,not G X=k<=r X=K and X K=r>=k K=G and K X=K or X K=8904717-75642 j=X and K X=2627297563%15767781 j=j or X elseif j<239758526%1718114 then j=8757938-(-151920+(-154683-(-270282-(478580275%3569902-864646))))else e=974867-974802 h=R[v[279837+-279834]]n=h*e h=199584+-199327 c=n%h R[v[1365615813%15173509]]=c j=14064093-1017661<(1080844788-961299)%28002005 j=j and 244409596%(-544028+14884253)or-1006723+9604066 else U,j=595573422%14526181,4257350522%18247458 s=b[U]O=s end end end else if j<2911236-271414 then if j>(889528155-198078)%(((541732+6341652844926%46289448472)%3086709833)%19800304)then if j<1518274-(-841768)then j=c and 1220903014%18647831 or 779132+5339607183%(5807377584%27148303)else end,function(F)for t=602805-602804,#F,-866786-(468343+(-1019301+-315829))do n[F[t]]=(345683836%3106785-830700)+n[F[t]]end if S then local j=S(true)local v({},{[t(680179-639811)]=o,[t(2478767476%14932091)]=F;[t(-699162-(-739522))]=function()return(1675762-864339)-(-841691)end})end end,function(F,t)local J=e(t)local S=function(S)return j(F,{S},t,J)end return S end,function(F,t)local J=e(t)local S=function(S,v)return j(F,{S,v},t,J)end return S end,function(F,t)local J=e(t)local S=function(...)return j(F,{...},t,J)end return S end,{},function(F)n[F]=n[F]-(-441055-(-441056))if-313626+313626==n[F]then n[F],R[F]=nil,nil end end,function(F)local
